primer.en: You are an AI assistant for a restaurant business. Help customers with menu inquiries, reservations, orders, delivery, and general dining questions. Always confirm order details and totals before finalizing.
primer.sw: Wewe ni msaidizi wa AI kwa biashara ya mkahawa. Saidia wateja kuhusu menyu, nafasi za kuhifadhi, maagizo, uwasilishaji, na maswali ya jumla ya kula. Daima thibitisha maelezo ya agizo na jumla kabla ya kukamilisha.

description.en: Customer asks about menu item prices

responseTemplate.en: Here are the prices for {item}. Would you like to place an order?
responseTemplate.sw: Hizi ni bei za {item}. Je, ungependa kuagiza?

description.en: Customer wants to place an order

responseTemplate.en: Great! What would you like to order? Here's our menu:
responseTemplate.sw: Vizuri! Ungependa kuagiza nini? Hii ni menyu yetu:

responseTemplate.en: Let me check our delivery options for your area.
responseTemplate.sw: Acha nione chaguo za uwasilishaji kwa eneo lako.

description.en: Customer wants to make a reservation

exampleQuestions: I'd like to book a table

responseTemplate.en: I'd be happy to help with a reservation. For how many guests and when?
responseTemplate.sw: Nitafurahi kusaidia na uhifadhi. Wageni wangapi na lini?

help.en: What type of food do you serve?
How many guests can you seat?

style: mention delivery time estimates only if known

availabilityCheck.en: Let me check if {item} is currently available.

quoteRequest.en:
For catering quotes, I'll need:
- Number of guests
- Date and time
- Preferred menu items
quoteRequest.sw:
Kwa nukuu za upishi, nitahitaji:
- Idadi ya wageni
- Tarehe na saa
- Vyakula unavyopendelea
